reach_why: Reframes continual learning, task segmentation, novelty detection, and adaptive architecture under a broad anti-boundary perspective.
novelty_why: Offers a provocative inversion: tasks emerge from architectural growth, not vice versa; jargon weakens genuine originality.
falsifiable_why: Partly testable via boundary-free learners outperforming task-based baselines, but core metaphysical claims remain underdefined.
explanation: Continual learning may be adaptive restructuring under uncertainty, with tasks appearing as retrospective conveniences.
